file: 1426_Fujitsuka 等 - 2020 - Development of PtZeolite for Selective Conversion of n-Decane and n-Dodecane to i.txt

experiments.description: 在固定床流动反应器中，使用不同结构和酸量的Pt/沸石催化剂，在200-250°C和氢气气氛下，进行正癸烷(n-C10)的加氢异构化和轻度裂解反应。
experiments.text_snippet: Hydroisomerization and mild cracking of n-paraffins were carried out by using a fixed-bed flow reactor at ambient pressure... n-Decane was first used as a reactant... The reaction was conducted... at 200 to 250 °C.

experiments.reaction_type: 加氢异构化反应 / 裂解反应
experiments.reaction_type_english: Hydrogenation reaction / Isomerization reaction / Cracking reaction
experiments.description: 使用优化后的Pt/MFI(200)催化剂以及进一步改性的MgO/Pt/MFI(200)催化剂，在200-250°C和氢气气氛下，进行正十二烷(n-C12)的加氢异构化和轻度裂解反应，旨在抑制过度裂解并提高目标异构烷烃产率。
experiments.text_snippet: Further modification of the optimized catalyst was performed for isoparaffin production from n-dodecane... hydroisomerization and cracking of n-C12 over Pt(0.5)/MFI(200) with and without 1 wt% MgO loading at 200-250 °C

Product yield.original: 35 C-mol% desired isoparaffins from n-C12 at 250°C with MgO-modified catalyst

Product Selectivity.original: i-C10 selectivity increased with lower solid acid amount

experiments.experiment_description: 在固定床流动反应器中，使用不同结构和酸量的Pt/沸石催化剂，在200-250°C和氢气气氛下，进行正癸烷(n-C10)的加氢异构化和轻度裂解反应。
experiments.text_snippet: Hydroisomerization and mild cracking of n-paraffins were carried out by using a fixed-bed flow reactor at ambient pressure... n-Decane was first used as a reactant... The reaction was conducted... at 200 to 250 °C.

Product yield.original: 35 C-mol% desired isoparaffin yield (for MgO(1)/Pt(0.5)/MFI(200) at 250°C, W/F=0.8 h)

Product Selectivity.original: For Pt(0.5)/MFI(200) at 200°C: Desired product (i-C7, i-C8, i-C9): 8.2 C-mol%, Isomerized intermediate (i-C12): 1.6 C-mol%, Cracked intermediate (n-C7, n-C8, n-C9): 8.2 C-mol%, Lighter byproduct (C3-C6): 6.6 C-mol%
